title: Require Generic Service Anchor Exports
forbids: an existing service spine file without the direct generic const export for its role, while excluding the required embedded API-plugin boundary/type base.ts from the standalone runtime-base role
why: A direct standalone runtime base, contract, service, module, or router anchor gives each implementation spine file one stable structural name while the embedded API base remains a type boundary and callers provide product qualification.
remediate: Directly export base from standalone-service base.ts, contract from contract.ts, service from root impl.ts, module from module.ts, and router from router.ts. Keep embedded API-plugin base.ts as its required boundary/type anchor without a runtime base export; its implementation begins at impl.ts. Leave export-use and intentional-boundary decisions to Knip and the dedicated JSDoc boundary.
message: Each service spine file must directly export its generic local anchor.
